caption.text:
New year, new goals—but goals don’t mean much if your environment stays the same.
Your results are a reflection of your proximity.
Get around people who challenge you, elevate you, and force you to level up.
Growth happens faster when you’re in the right rooms. 💯

carousel_media.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Miguel De La Rosa on December 31, 2025 tagging @jeremyleeminer.

caption.text:
Happy birthday to my bro, who has been riding with me for the past few years @miguel___delarosa 🎉

Who was once in my Inner Circle became my brother for life. Most genuine person that I’ve had a pleasure to mentor and create lasting memories with. Family for life, and you can take that tot he bank 🏦 

Wish you nothing but the best fam!

#family #brother #brotherhood

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Mike Barron on September 29, 2024 tagging @miguel___delarosa.

caption.text:
Ran into @officialandyelliott and his family and it was such of an experience. We chopped it up for a min. 

You know what they say… “when the student is ready the teacher will appear”

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Miguel De La Rosa on August 09, 2025 tagging @officialandyelliott.

caption.text:
Tus pensamientos son tus acciones que te dan un resultado y ese resultados son tu realidad. El problema es que no quieres tomar acción. 

Sigues con la acciones tontas queriendo un resultado positivo. La sociedad es tan incongruente!

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on May 05, 2026. May be an image of one or more people, beard, biceps, people bodybuilding, sportswear, sweatpants and text.

caption.text: Consistencia es la clave!!

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa in Scottsdale, Arizona. May be a selfie of one or more people, biceps, people bodybuilding and text.

caption.text:
There’s a quote “ everyone what’s to go to heaven, but no body wants to die” 

Well that is how the majority of people operate. They want something but don’t want to put in the work to achieve it. 

You want to feel better about yourself but you’re lazy. 

You want your old clothes to fit you. But you keep avoiding the gym. 

You want to build confidence, but you are full of excuses. 

Small changes = Big results

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on April 19, 2026. May be an image of text.

caption.text:
The reality is no one will come to change your life.. 

You have the power of choosing your path. What do you want ? 

You want to build or destroy? 

Build the best version of you or destroy yourself with poor habits?

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on April 03, 2026. May be a selfie of one or more people, biceps, people bodybuilding and text.

caption.text: La vida es buena !!

Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on March 30, 2026. May be an image of all-terain vehicle, dune buggy, buggy, glasses and text.

caption.text:
There are no “horrible” macros.

But there are GOOD choices… and BAD choices for your goal.

🥔 GOOD CARBS
Fuel your workouts. Keep you fuller. Support performance.

🍩 BAD CARBS
Easy to overeat. Low fiber. Spike calories quickly.

🍗 GOOD PROTEIN
High protein, minimally processed → supports muscle and fat loss.

🌭 BAD PROTEIN
Ultra-processed, lower quality, calorie-dense for the amount of protein you get.

🥑 GOOD FATS
Support hormones and health — when portions are controlled.

🍟 BAD FATS
Deep-fried, refined oils, heavy sauces that quietly blow your calories.

You don’t need perfection.
You need GOOD choices most of the time.

Follow, like and save for more simple fat loss education. 🤝

caption.text:
At some point… you have to stop making excuses.

No one is coming to save you.
No perfect time is coming.
No motivation is going to magically show up.

It’s just you… and the decision to level up.

The truth?
You already know what to do.
You’re just choosing comfort over growth.

That ends today.

Build the body.
Fix your habits.
Become the man you said you were going to be.

Start now. Not when it’s easy.

Follow for more discipline and real self-development.

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on March 23, 2026. May be a selfie of one or more people, beard, biceps, sweatpants and text.

caption.text:
9 week transformation!! 

What changed ??

- My intensity of training!! 
When I hit my workouts I make sure that my rest times are short so I can keep a 120 to 140 heart rate. That’s going to help burning more calories. 

All my work outs are 4 sets of 10 to 15 reps depending on the exercise. 

I out produce my self every time. I ether go heavier, do drop sets or change the tempo. 

My nutrition is on point. I track my macros and calories!! 

If you don’t know what you are putting in your body you will never achieve your goals. 

Cardio - I do 10 to 12k steps daily in top of my designated cardio. 

It’s so easy now !!

caption.text:
Fat Loss Cheat Sheet.

Keep it simple: build your meals around solid proteins, smart carbs, and quality fats. Do that consistently, stay active, and the results follow.

Most people overcomplicate fat loss. It’s not about magic foods — it’s about making better choices more often.

Save this for your next grocery run.
Follow for more simple, real-world fat loss value

caption.text:
At the end of the day. Your faith and your vision it’s what matters. 

No one it’s in control of your thoughts and desires. 

Work on you when no one it’s watching, so that you can do the right thing when no one it’s watching!

It’s all about the decision you make !! 

Habits it’s the structure of your future!!

caption.text:
This body didn’t come from motivation.
It came from decisions.

There were days I didn’t feel like training.
Days where the easy choice was skipping the workout, ordering the junk food, or telling myself “tomorrow.”

But the truth is… your body reflects your standards.

Most people aren’t stuck because they don’t know what to do.
They’re stuck because their mindset hasn’t caught up with the man they want to become.

Discipline builds confidence.
Confidence builds momentum.
Momentum changes your life.

Fitness is just the starting point.
When you learn to control your body, you start taking control of everything else.

If you’re tired of feeling stuck and you’re ready to rebuild yourself mentally and physically…

Comment REBUILD or send me a message and I’ll show you the next step.

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on March 05, 2026. May be an image of one or more people, beard, biceps, people bodybuilding and text.

caption.text:
Fat loss isn’t about cutting carbs or fearing fats.

It’s about choosing the GOOD options more often than the BAD ones.

🥔 GOOD CARBS 
Support energy, training performance, and keep you satisfied.

🍩 BAD CARBS 
Low satiety, highly processed, easy to overconsume.

🍗 GOOD PROTEIN 
Lean, high-quality sources that support muscle and recovery.

🌭 BAD PROTEIN 
Highly processed, lower protein density, higher calories.

🥑 GOOD FATS 
Important for hormones, recovery, and overall health.

🍟 BAD FATS 
Fried, refined, and easy to overeat without realizing it.

The goal isn’t restriction. 
The goal is awareness and better decisions.

Follow for more simple strategies to lose fat, build muscle, and understand nutrition.

caption.text:
Most people don’t struggle with nutrition because of what they eat…
They struggle because of how often they eat certain foods.

Here’s a simple rule:

Eat daily
Foods that support performance, recovery, and long-term health.
High-quality, minimally processed options that keep you full, stabilize energy, and help maintain muscle while managing body fat.

Eat weekly
Foods that are enjoyable but more calorie dense.
They don’t harm progress when controlled, but eating them too frequently makes fat loss harder and consistency unpredictable.

Eat monthly
Highly processed, low-satiety foods designed for overconsumption.
They add calories quickly, provide little nutritional value, and easily slow down physique and health goals when they become habits.

You don’t need extreme dieting.
You need better frequency and better awareness.

Follow for practical fitness and nutrition strategies that make results sustainable.

caption.text:
People always think about the cost 💲. 

It’s never about the cost, it’s all about the worth. 

Is it worth it working out ? 

Is it worth it eating healthy? 

Do the hard things not so you can enjoy later !!

caption.text:
There are no “horrible” macros.

But there are GOOD choices… and BAD choices for your goal.

🥔 GOOD CARBS
Fuel your workouts. Keep you fuller. Support performance.

🍩 BAD CARBS
Easy to overeat. Low fiber. Spike calories quickly.

🍗 GOOD PROTEIN
High protein, minimally processed → supports muscle and fat loss.

🌭 BAD PROTEIN
Ultra-processed, lower quality, calorie-dense for the amount of protein you get.

🥑 GOOD FATS
Support hormones and health — when portions are controlled.

🍟 BAD FATS
Deep-fried, refined oils, heavy sauces that quietly blow your calories.

You don’t need perfection.
You need GOOD choices most of the time.

Follow, Like and save for more simple fat loss education. 🤝

caption.text:
When you want to lose weight and get in the vast shape of your life it’s not saying bye to all the tasty foods. 

It’s all about BALANCE! 

It’s knowing when to eat and what to eat! 

If you want more tips, don’t forget to follow and share.

caption.text:
Don’t get distracted for the material things! 

You get so distracted in building a business, that you forget about the most important things.

It’s not about cutting all foods for ever!! 

It’s about balancing your nutrition according to your activity and fitness goals !

caption.text:
People think being a single dad is a disadvantage. 

For me, it’s fuel ⛽️ 

She doesn’t need a perfect dad. 
She needs a present one. 

So we play. 
We laugh. 
And I keep becoming better. 

Because the example I set today
becomes the standard she accepts tomorrow. 

#dad #singledadlife

caption.text:
Here the 3 steps to lose body fat 

Step 1. Dial in your nutrition. You have to be in a calorie deficit to get shredded 

Step 2. Have a personalized Training Program so that you can workout 3- 4 times a week without guessing. 

Step 3. You have to do cardio to lose body fat. 3- 4 times a week. Stair master- Level 7 for 30 min. 

#losebodyfat #fitplan #gymfood

caption.text:
Most people don’t need a stricter diet.�They need smarter decisions.

Not extreme.�Not all-or-nothing.
�Just better options — done consistently.

Swap soda for zero-calorie drinks or water.�Swap fried for grilled or air-fried.�Swap heavy sauces for low-calorie flavor.�Swap high-fat cuts for lean protein.�Swap calorie-dense dips for Greek yogurt-based options.�Swap mindless snacking for planned meals.

You don’t lose body fat from one perfect week.�You lose it from stacking small upgrades over time.

Stop chasing perfection.�Start winning the daily swaps.

Follow for more simple fat loss strategies that actually work. 

#fatlosstips #fitnesstips

caption.text:
Good proteins vs. low-quality proteins.�Good carbs vs. low-quality carbs.�Good fats vs. low-quality fats.

Simple.

Choose lean, whole proteins more often.�Choose carbs that fuel performance, not just cravings.�Choose fats that support hormones and recovery, not just taste.

It’s not about being extreme — it’s about stacking better choices daily so your body responds the way you want it to.

PS: Your activity level determines how much flexibility you can have. The more you train and move, the more calories your body can utilize. Fat loss or muscle gain still comes down to total intake — but output matters too.

Follow for more real nutrition education.�Like and share with someone who needs this.

caption.text:
Same body. Two goals. One strategy.

Stop chasing extremes. Muscle is built when your nutrition supports your training — and your training demands growth.

It’s not about perfect foods. It’s about consistent habits.

PS: You can lose fat or build muscle with almost any foods if your portions and total calories are dialed in. Control the numbers, control the results.

Follow for more straight-to-the-point fitness value.

#gymfood #nutrition #gains

caption.text:
Left side: what to eat.m to lose fat �Right side: what to eat to build muscle 

Most people think it’s complicated. It’s not.�Build your meals with intention. Train with intensity. Repeat.

Muscle isn’t built from random eating — it’s built from structure, consistency, and progressive overload.

PS: You can lose fat or gain muscle eating almost any food. What matters is portion control and total calories. Master that, and you control the outcome.

Follow for simple, no-BS fitness education.

#losefat #gymfood #nutrition

caption.text:
Fat Loss Cheat Sheet.

Keep it simple: build your meals around solid proteins, smart carbs, and quality fats. Do that consistently, stay active, and the results follow.

Most people overcomplicate fat loss. It’s not about magic foods — it’s about making better choices more often.

Save this for your next grocery run.
Follow for more simple, real-world fat loss value

caption.text:
The goal is NOT to cut foods forever. The goal is to build discipline and learn balance.

You don’t eliminate things for life — you earn the flexibility through consistency.

When you train hard, stay active, and take care of your body daily, you create space for the foods you enjoy. The once-a-week and once-a-month moments aren’t cheat meals… they’re earned moments.

Discipline first. Balance second. Lifestyle forever.

That’s how you stay in shape without feeling restricted.

caption.text:
No flex just faith. 

For a while I want To impress others. I was doing it for the wrong reasons. Guess wha when you do thing for the wrong reason the outcome will be wrong too. 

Not to long ago my relationship with God has become stronger. I have realized that I need to give faith to people. That if I can do it, you can do it too. 

If I’m getting out of a divorce feeling depressed and insecure about myself, in top of builds business and being a dad. You can also do that and more. 

Never stop believing in yourself.!! 

If you want to start feeling like you’re supposed to. Confident, Happy, Proud…. Dm “COACH “ let’s get to work!!

caption.text:
If I can tell you something powerful today is this. 

“It’s not what happens to you, it how you react to it that matters!!”

caption.text:
This were exactly the stages… 

Being depressed from a divorce made me feel insecure about myself. 

I had to work on me to start feeling something positive again. The lost of love could produce fears, so I had to put myself first and give self love to me!! 

Now!? God, time and myself have put in work and we are back like a slingshot!!

caption.text: Your health is the most important thing you have don’t take for granted!

node.accessibility_caption: Photo shared by Miguel De La Rosa on February 06, 2026 tagging @dlr.fitnesss. May be a meme of one or more people and beard.

caption.text: Progressing….middle of week 3!!

node.accessibility_caption: Photo by Miguel De La Rosa on February 05, 2026. May be a selfie of one or more people and biceps.

caption.text:
This is a 12 week transformation from Diana !! 

Amazing work that she has put in! 

We work on 4 things 

1. Mindset tuning- Your thoughts become actions. Your actions give you a result. Your results shapes your reality!! So if you can control your thoughts you can control your reality!!! 

2. Training !! - having a training program so that you know exactly what to do and you are not guessing. “Programs pushes the ideal outcome. 

3. Nutrition- 80% of your results are in your nutrition habits. 

4. Cardio - you don’t have to kill your self on doing cardio. But you do have to be active enough to burn fat.
